key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh usage data in seconds

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display usage in the panel: 'ring' for a circular gauge and percentage, 'text' for percentage text, 'bar' for a progress bar, or 'both' for bar and percentage

key.name: panel-window
key.description: Which usage window the panel reflects: 'primary' for the 5-hour window, 'secondary' for the 7-day window, or 'max' for the most constrained window

key.name: usage-display
key.description: Whether to display used or remaining percentages

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style: 'color' for the original colored icon, 'monochrome' for a desaturated monochrome icon

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the Codex icon in the top bar

key.name: show-additional-limits
key.description: Whether to show model-specific rate limits (e.g. GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark) in the menu

key.name: show-tier
key.description: Whether to show the detected plan tier in the top bar

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: HTTP proxy URL (e.g., http://localhost:11809). Leave empty to use no proxy.
